jobs.title: Data Engineer, Machine Learning
jobs.why: SafetyCulture 3月放出的 ML Engineering 岗位；澳洲第三大最佳职场 + T1 本土独角兽，产品服务 30亿工人，学员当前不一定够得着，但目标感强。

jobs.title: Machine Learning Engineer Graduate, Trust and Safety Engineering — 2026 Start
jobs.why: TikTok Graduate 明确 BS/MS 应届门槛，Rolling review 随时可投；Bootcamp 毕业生完成 Phase 3 ML Pipeline 实战项目后可直接申请。

jobs.tierLabel: 特殊机会 · Named Graduate Program
jobs.title: Machine Learning Engineer, 2026 Graduate Australia & New Zealand
jobs.why: Atlassian 2026 ML Engineer Graduate Program 是 Central AI 团队 AU/NZ 应届专属岗；12 个月薪资 + 远程 + AI Editor/Summarisation 方向，学生/应届身份可申，入职门槛比正式岗位低。

alternativeCandidates.note: Recommendation algorithm team; heavy ML research focus; rolling review

alternativeCandidates.title: Machine Learning Engineer Graduate (Data-Search-TikTok) — 2026 Start (BS/MS)

alternativeCandidates.note: PhD-track only; good aspirational reference for research-oriented students

alternativeCandidates.title: Machine Learning Engineer, 2026 PhD Graduate Australia & New Zealand
alternativeCandidates.note: PhD version of Atlassian 2026 graduate cohort; Central AI / AI editor & summarisation

alternativeCandidates.title: Engineering Graduate Program (with AI/ML/GenAI exposure)
